kilauea_notices.title: HAWAIIAN VOLCANO OBSERVATORY DAILY UPDATE
kilauea_notices.message: HVO Kilauea YELLOW/ADVISORY - The summit eruption in Halemaʻumaʻu has resumed with weak precursory spattering, no overflows have occurred at this time. The onset of episode 50 fountaining will most likely occur today, Friday June 26 or tomorrow, Saturday June 27 (less likely).

mauna_loa_notices.title: HAWAIIAN VOLCANO OBSERVATORY MONTHLY UPDATE
mauna_loa_notices.message: HVO Haleakala GREEN/NORMAL - No activity of concern for Haleakalā.
